name: Timeline
description: Vertical event timeline with icons and connectors.

api.name: Timeline
api.description: Vertical event timeline with icons and connectors.

parameters.name: Animated
parameters.description: When true, each TimelineItem fades+translates in with a staggered delay, the active indicator pulses, and connector segments draw themselves as the active step advances. Default is false.

parameters.name: ActiveIndex
parameters.description: When set AND Animated is true, drives the active-dot progression: items with index < ActiveIndex render as "completed" (solid primary), the item at ActiveIndex pulses, later items are pending (muted). Connectors up to the active index draw themselves. Use together with ActiveIndexChanged for two-way binding.

records.name: TimelineContext
records.signature: TimelineContext(TimelineOrientation Orientation, bool Animated, int? ActiveIndex, int? PreviousActiveIndex, int ReplayKey, Timeline Parent)

examples.title: Vertical Timeline
examples.code:
<Timeline>
    <TimelineItem Title="Order placed" Description="Your order has been placed." Time="Jan 1, 2025" />
    <TimelineItem Title="Processing" Description="Being processed." Time="Jan 2, 2025" />
    <TimelineItem Title="Shipped" Description="Shipped via express." Time="Jan 3, 2025" />
    <TimelineItem Title="Delivered" Description="Has been delivered." Time="Jan 5, 2025" />
</Timeline>

examples.title: With Icons
examples.code:
<Timeline>
    <TimelineItem Title="Account created" Time="9:00 AM">
        <IconContent><Blazicon Svg="Lucide.UserPlus" class="h-4 w-4" /></IconContent>
    </TimelineItem>
    <TimelineItem Title="Profile updated" Time="10:30 AM">
        <IconContent><Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Pencil" class="h-4 w-4" /></IconContent>
    </TimelineItem>
</Timeline>

examples.title: Horizontal Timeline
examples.code:
<Timeline Orientation="Timeline.TimelineOrientation.Horizontal">
    <TimelineItem Title="Step 1" Description="Planning" />
    <TimelineItem Title="Step 2" Description="Design" />
    <TimelineItem Title="Step 3" Description="Development" />
    <TimelineItem Title="Step 4" Description="Launch" />
</Timeline>

examples.title: Orientation (interactive)
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_orientation">
    <SegmentedItem Value="@Timeline.TimelineOrientation.Vertical">Vertical</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@Timeline.TimelineOrientation.Horizontal">Horizontal</SegmentedItem>
</Segmented>
<Timeline Orientation="@_orientation">
    <TimelineItem Title="Planning" Description="Scope defined" Time="Jan 1" />
    <TimelineItem Title="Design" Description="Wireframes approved" Time="Jan 8" />
    <TimelineItem Title="Development" Description="Sprint in progress" Time="Jan 15" />
    <TimelineItem Title="Launch" Description="Shipped to production" Time="Feb 1" />
</Timeline>

@code { private Timeline.TimelineOrientation _orientation = Timeline.TimelineOrientation.Vertical; }

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

parameters.name: IsActive
parameters.description: When set, marks this item as the "active" (current) item. When the parent Timeline has Animated="true", this item's indicator pulses. If the parent also sets ActiveIndex, that value wins — use IsActive for static cases only.

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

mdSummary:
# Timeline

Vertical event timeline with icons and connectors.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Lists & Trees
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/timeline

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Timeline | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Timeline | Orientation | `TimelineOrientation` | `TimelineOrientation.Vertical` |  |
| Timeline | Animated | `bool` | `` | When true, each TimelineItem fades+translates in with a staggered delay, the active indicator pulses, and connector segments draw themselves as the active step advances. Default is false. |
| Timeline | ActiveIndex | `int?` | `` | When set AND Animated is true, drives the active-dot progression: items with index < ActiveIndex render as "completed" (solid primary), the item at ActiveIndex pulses, later items are pending (muted). Connectors up to the active index draw themselves. Use together with ActiveIndexChanged for two-way binding. |
| Timeline | ActiveIndexChanged | `EventCallback<int>` | `` | Two-way binding callback for ActiveIndex. |
| Timeline | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Timeline | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TimelineItem | Context | `Timeline.TimelineContext?` | `` |  |
| TimelineItem | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component. |
| TimelineItem | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| TimelineItem | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| TimelineItem | Time | `string?` | `` |  |
| TimelineItem | IsActive | `bool` | `` | When set, marks this item as the "active" (current) item. When the parent Timeline has Animated="true", this item's indicator pulses. If the parent also sets ActiveIndex, that value wins — use IsActive for static cases only. |
| TimelineItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TimelineItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Timeline) — RenderFragment slot
- `IconContent` (TimelineItem) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

## Events
- `ActiveIndexChanged` (`EventCallback<int>`) — Two-way binding callback for ActiveIndex.

## Sub-components
- `TimelineItem`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Timeline.TimelineContext?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Timeline />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Timeline/Timeline.razor`
- `UI/Timeline/TimelineItem.razor`
